title: AST Compliance Cleanup for Test Infrastructure
source: Code-reviewer findings for Stages 1-3 of cross_namespace_phase2

baseline.notes: Build succeeded. Tests require xvfb-run due to GTK dependencies. The plan addresses violations identified by code-reviewer: string matching in C validation tests instead of AST-based approaches. Existing infrastructure (C_ast.ml, C_parser.ml, C_validation.ml) provides foundation for AST-based validation.

epochs.title: AST Compliance Cleanup
epochs.description: Convert all string-matching test assertions to AST-based validation, fixCAMLparam validation tests, and deprecate legacy helpers

stages.title: Create C_validation AST-based header validation functions
stages.description: Addassert_forward_decl_exists, assert_forward_decl_not_exists, andassert_header_guard_format functions to C_validation.ml using the existing C_parser and C_ast infrastructure
stages.implementation_notes:
C_validation.ml already exists with validation functions. Add three new functions:

1. assert_forward_decl_exists header_content c_type prefix:
   - Parse header with C_parser to extract forward declarations
   - Match declarations like Val_<Type> or<Type>_val
   - Fail with descriptive message if not found

2. assert_forward_decl_not_exists header_content c_type prefix:
   - Same parsing, but assert ABSENCE

3. assert_header_guard_format header_content expected_pattern:
   - Parse header guards (already have parse_header_guards in c_stubs_tests.ml, can move or reuse)
   - Validate guard name matches expected pattern

The header_guard type already exists in c_stubs_tests.ml (lines 17-22). Consider moving to C_ast.ml for reuse.

Followthe pattern in ml_validation.ml for assertion functions - use Alcotest.fail with clear messages.
coding_guidelines_to_emphasize: test-patterns.md — All validation must use AST parsing first, never string_contains
error-handling.md — Use Alcotest.fail with descriptive messages for assertion failures
module-boundaries.md — Add .mli interface for new functions

existing_tests: ocgtk/src/tools/test_gir_gen/c_stubs/c_stubs_tests.ml — existing header guard tests will use new functions

new_tests.description: Verify assert_forward_decl_exists finds local enum/bitfield declarations
new_tests.asserts: Function succeeds when Val_<Type> exists, fails when absent
Function succeeds when declaration absent, fails when present

acceptance_criteria: Each function uses C_parser/C_ast for validation (no string matching)
Functions have clear error messages on failure

stages.title: Rewrite no_external_enum_decls_tests.ml to use AST validation
stages.description: Replace assert_contains/assert_not_contains calls in no_external_enum_decls_tests.ml with C_validation assertion functions
stages.implementation_notes:
Replace lines 106-116 and 150-155:

OLD (lines 106-116):
```ocaml
assert_contains "Local GTK enum Val_ forward decl" header_content
    "Val_GtkWrapMode";
assert_contains "Local GTK enum _val forward decl" header_content
    "GtkWrapMode_val";
assert_not_contains "External GDK enum Val_ forward decl" header_content
    "Val_GdkTextureType";
assert_not_contains "External GDK enum _val forward decl" header_content
    "GdkTextureType_val"
```

NEW:
```ocaml
C_validation.assert_forward_decl_exists header_content "GtkWrapMode" "Val_";
C_validation.assert_forward_decl_exists header_content "GtkWrapMode" "_val";
C_validation.assert_forward_decl_not_exists header_content "GdkTextureType" "Val_";
C_validation.assert_forward_decl_not_exists header_content "GdkTextureType" "_val"
```

Same pattern for lines 150-155.

Remove reliance on open Helpers - import C_validation instead. Keep Helpers for other utilities like create_test_context.
coding_guidelines_to_emphasize: test-patterns.md — Anti-pattern checklist: No assert_contains for code validation
code-reuse.md — Use existing C_validation functions, don't duplicate
error-handling.md — Let C_validation provide descriptive failure messages
acceptance_criteria: No calls to assert_contains or assert_not_contains in no_external_enum_decls_tests.ml
Test behavior unchanged (same validations, just AST-based)

stages.title: Fix Str.search_forward violations in c_stubs_tests.ml
stages.description: Replace Str.search_forward with AST-based or proper string functions for header guard naming check and CAMLparam validation
stages.implementation_notes:
Two violations to fix:

**1. contains_old_naming function (lines 67-74):**

OLD:
```ocaml
let contains_old_naming header_content =
  let guards = parse_header_guards header_content in
  List.exists (fun g ->
    try
      ignore (Str.search_forward (Str.regexp_string "generated_forward_decls") g.guard_name 0);
      true
    with Not_found -> false
  ) guards
```

NEW:
```ocaml
let contains_old_naming header_content =
  let guards = parse_header_guards header_content in
  List.exists (fun g ->
    String.ends_with ~suffix:"generated_forward_decls_h_" g.guard_name ||
    String.ends_with ~suffix:"_generated_forward_decls_h" g.guard_name
  ) guards
```

Use String.ends_with instead of Str.search_forward - more precise and doesn't use regex.

**2. test_method_camlxparam_chunking (lines 457-481):**

This tests that CAMLxparam macros are used correctly for chunking parameters.

OLD (lines 457-481):
```ocaml
let has_high_camlxparam =
  try
    ignore (Str.search_forward (Str.regexp "CAMLxparam[6-9]") c_code 0);
    true
  with Not_found ->
    try
      ignore (Str.search_forward (Str.regexp "CAMLxparam1[0-9]") c_code 0);
      true
    with Not_found -> false
in
```

The C_ast module already has get_caml_local_decls function (lines 156-163). Add a validation function to C_validation.ml:
```ocaml
let has_camlxparam_n_or_higher functions n =
  List.exists (fun f ->
    let decls = C_ast.get_caml_local_decls f in
    List.exists (fun decl ->
      String.starts_with ~prefix:"CAMLxparam" decl &&
      let num_str = String.sub decl 10 (String.length decl - 11) in
      try
        let num = int_of_string num_str in
        num >= n
      with _ -> false
    ) decls
  ) functions
```

Then use it inthe test:
```ocaml
let functions = parse_c_string c_code in
Alcotest.(check bool) "Should NOT contain CAMLxparam6 or higher" false
  (C_validation.has_camlxparam_n_or_higher functions 6);
```
coding_guidelines_to_emphasize: test-patterns.md — Use proper string functions or AST parsing, not regex for simple patterns
type-safety.md — Use typed functions with clear contracts
partial-functions.md — Avoid exception-based control flow (try/with Not_found)
acceptance_criteria: No Str.search_forward in contains_old_naming or test_method_camlxparam_chunking

stages.title: Deprecate string-matching helpers in helpers.ml
stages.description: Add deprecation warnings to string_contains, assert_contains, and assert_not_contains functions in helpers.ml
stages.implementation_notes:
Add deprecation annotations to lines 9-23:

```ocaml
(* DEPRECATED: These functions use string matching which is brittle and
   violates the test-patterns.md guidelines. Use C_validation.assert_forward_decl_*
   or Ml_validation.assert_*_exists for AST-based validation instead.

   See docs/code_guidelines/test-patterns.md for details. *)

[@@@deprecated "Use C_validation.assert_forward_decl_* or Ml_validation.assert_*_exists for AST-based validation"]

let string_contains s sub =
  (* DEPRECATED: Use AST-based validation instead *)
  try
    ignore (Str.search_forward (Str.regexp_string sub) s 0);
    true
  with Not_found -> false

let assert_true msg cond = Alcotest.(check bool) msg true cond

let assert_contains msg haystack needle =
  (* DEPRECATED: Use C_validation.assert_forward_decl_exists or Ml_validation.assert_value_exists *)
  if not (string_contains haystack needle) then
    Alcotest.fail (sprintf "%s: expected to find '%s' in output" msg needle)

let assert_not_contains msg haystack needle =
  (* DEPRECATED: Use C_validation.assert_forward_decl_not_exists *)
  if string_contains haystack needle then
    Alcotest.fail (sprintf "%s: expected NOT to find '%s' in output" msg needle)
```

DO NOT remove these functions yet - they may be used elsewhere. Just deprecate.

This stage must come after Stages 4 and 5 to ensure all uses are converted first.
coding_guidelines_to_emphasize: test-patterns.md — Reference the guidelines explaining why string matching is discouraged
code-reuse.md — Functions should be deprecated before removal to allow migration

existing_tests: All tests should still pass after deprecation warnings are added

acceptance_criteria: dune build succeeds (deprecation warnings are acceptable)
string_contains, assert_contains, assert_not_contains have deprecation annotations or comments
Comment explains why and points to alternatives
